name: Montego Monty & Me Adult Cat Dry Food - 5kg
description: Product Overview Montego Monty & Me Adult Cat Food is a nutritionally balanced dry cat food formulated to support the overall health and vitality of adult cats. It provides high-quality protein, essential vitamins, minerals, and taurine to promote strong vision, a healthy heart, and sustained energy. Nutritional Profile & Benefits Protein & Fat (28% Protein, 12% Fat): Supports lean muscle maintenance and provides the energy needed for daily activity. Vitamins & Minerals: Fortified with Vitamins C and E, minerals, and antioxidants to boost immunity and promote healthy skin and coat. Taurine: An essential amino acid that supports heart health, strong vision, and overall feline well-being. Omega-6 Oils & Amino Acids: Enhance skin, coat, and digestive health for optimal nutrition. Natural Prebiotic Fibre: Aids in maintaining a healthy digestive system. No Artificial Additives: Free from soya, artificial flavours, and colours—suitable for most adult cat breeds. Metabolisable Energy: 382 kcal per 100g, providing sufficient energy for active cats. Key Ingredients Corn*, poultry meal, wheat bran, rice, corn gluten, animal fat, fish meal, brewer’s yeast, beet pulp, fish oil, acidifiers, salt, minerals, vitamins, taurine, L-Lysine, and DL-Methionine. May contain GMOs. Contains approved antioxidants and natural meat-based flavour enhancers for improved palatability. Product Features Suitable for all adult cat breeds Supports playful, energetic, and healthy lifestyles Helps maintain optimal growth, strength, and vitality
